valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Mon 18 May 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Tue 19 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low moving steadily east expected 200 miles west of Rockall 988 by midnight tonight. Lows Fair Isle 1004 and Hebrides 1003 losing their identities
